scope: repository-controlled report production and certification preparation

artifacts.title: Kernel specification
artifacts.boundary: licensed standards prevail on conflict

artifacts.title: Requirement traceability matrices
artifacts.boundary: lab test-case crosswalk remains external

artifacts.title: Lab submission manifest
artifacts.boundary: unattached report rows remain open

artifacts.title: Certification open issues
artifacts.boundary: controls external blockers

artifacts.title: ABI conformance statement
artifacts.boundary: not a signed lab conformance template

artifacts.title: Scheme profile dictionary
artifacts.boundary: does not disclose raw CAPK modulus material

artifacts.title: Masked pre-lab APDU trace fixture
artifacts.boundary: full lab trace pack remains external

artifacts.title: Pre-lab quality gate manifest
artifacts.boundary: coverage and formal reports remain external

artifacts.title: Parser/APDU no-crash smoke artifact
artifacts.boundary: not a fuzzing report

artifacts.title: Static and fuzz evidence plan
artifacts.boundary: plan only; accepted reports remain external

artifacts.title: Fuzz seed corpus manifest
artifacts.boundary: hash-only synthetic seed evidence

artifacts.title: Public standards watch
artifacts.boundary: public drift signal only

artifacts.title: Certification evidence attachment checklist
artifacts.boundary: attachment checklist only; does not close external gates

artifacts.title: Certification evidence intake ledger
artifacts.boundary: attachment slots only; accepted external evidence remains required

artifacts.title: Certification freeze manifest
artifacts.boundary: submitted-build hash slots only; external acceptance remains required

artifacts.title: Certification security assessment plan
artifacts.boundary: assessment plan only; external assessor report remains required

artifacts.title: Certification device evidence plan
artifacts.boundary: device/L1/PED plan only; external approvals remain required

artifacts.title: Certification integration report plan
artifacts.boundary: integration report plan only; full reports and trace packs remain external

artifacts.title: Certification report pack
artifacts.boundary: index only; external report attachments remain required

artifacts.title: Certification report workbench
artifacts.boundary: static local UI; not a lab portal or approval system

artifacts.title: 100% coverage workflow
artifacts.boundary: accepted submitted-build report remains external

artifacts.title: Tutorial and glossary learning path
artifacts.boundary: education only; not approval evidence

required_reports.title: 100% unit coverage report
required_reports.required_evidence: submitted commit, tool versions, target, feature set, coverage metadata JSON, and HTML/XML or lab-accepted report

required_reports.title: Full EMV integration report
required_reports.required_evidence: test-tool version, profile set, device firmware, APDU traces, outcomes, deviations, and disposition

required_reports.title: Static-analysis report
required_reports.required_evidence: accepted tool version, command lines, findings, remediations, and residual-risk acceptance

required_reports.title: Fuzzing/no-crash report
required_reports.required_evidence: engine versions, corpus hashes, run budgets, coverage/path metrics, crashes, and dispositions

required_reports.title: Signed conformance template and approval artifact
required_reports.required_evidence: recognized lab or authority-signed template tied to submitted binary, profile, and device scope

required_reports.title: Device, L1, and PCI/PED evidence
required_reports.required_evidence: target device approval, reader/L1 evidence, and PCI PTS/PED integration statement

evidence_requirements.authority: EMVCo, scheme, acquirer, and recognized laboratory
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: final lab execution report plus signed approval or LoA-equivalent artifact for the claimed interface, kernel, and scheme scope
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: submitted binary hash, profile hash, test-tool package, device model, firmware, and claimed interface list
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: approval artifact agrees with the submitted binary, profile set, device scope, and RTM

evidence_requirements.authority: scheme, acquirer, or laboratory profile authority
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: signed AID, TAC/IAC, limit, CVM, CDA-control, and kernel-selection profile bundle
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: profile version, issuer authority, retrieval date, signature status, rollback policy, and SHA-256
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: signed profile bundle is loaded through the verified profile path and matches trace identity

evidence_requirements.required_attachment: approved CAPK set with RID, key index, modulus, exponent, expiry, checksum, and provenance
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: CAPK source, retrieval date, expiry date, checksum, bundle hash, and approval reference
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: CAPK bundle passes repository checksum gates and traces to accepted public-key material

evidence_requirements.authority: recognized laboratory or scheme test-vector authority
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: complete lab-supplied SDA, DDA, and CDA cryptographic vectors with expected TVR/TSI and outcome data
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: vector class, vector source, tool version, expected outputs, method coverage, and bundle hash
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: docs/oda_test_vectors.json is replaced by vector_class CERTIFICATION and passes complete-vector validation
evidence_requirements.repository_support: src/oda.rs, docs/oda_test_vectors.json, ODA parser and validation tests

evidence_requirements.authority: EMVCo contactless kernel/product approval path and scheme profile authority
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: lab-selected C-8 version and bulletin reconciliation, profile data, contactless test-tool results, and outcome traces
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: C-8 version, bulletin set, included/excluded adjacent books, test-tool version, terminal profile, TTQ source, and trace pack hash
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: contactless claim is tied to the accepted C-8 package, profile set, device/L1 evidence, and masked outcome traces

evidence_requirements.authority: device vendor, L1 laboratory, scheme, and EMVCo process as applicable
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: target terminal, contact interface, contactless reader, firmware, and L1/device certification evidence
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: model, hardware revision, firmware, reader stack, L1 approval reference, and submitted binary/profile hash
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: device evidence names the same target, firmware, binary, profile bundle, and interface scope as the submission
evidence_requirements.repository_support: docs/lab_submission_manifest.md, trace identity metadata, C ABI integration examples

evidence_requirements.authority: PCI SSC, PCI-recognized laboratory, PED vendor, and security assessor
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: PCI PTS POI integration statement, PED-owned VERIFY evidence, and no-clear-PIN custody review
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: PTS listing or assessment reference, PED model, firmware, PIN method, opaque-handle policy, and integration evidence
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: PED evidence confirms the kernel only handles opaque PIN handles and cannot log or receive clear PIN data

evidence_requirements.authority: independent security assessor accepted for the product submission
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: penetration test and architecture review report covering APDU injection, state-machine bypass, trace leakage, and profile tampering
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: scope, commit hash, device/profile set, findings, remediations, residual-risk owner, and retest evidence
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: all critical/high findings are remediated or formally accepted before final certification-facing release

evidence_requirements.authority: submission owner, laboratory, scheme, or acquirer acceptance path
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: 100% unit coverage report plus coverage metadata JSON and full EMV test-plan integration report for the submitted build
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: source commit, Cargo version, Rust compiler version, target triple, feature set, cargo-llvm-cov version, threshold, enforcement mode, profile hash, CAPK hash, test-tool version, report hash, and deviations
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: coverage and integration reports match the submitted binary, profiles, CAPKs, vectors, and annex hashes

evidence_requirements.authority: submission owner, laboratory, scheme, or acquirer acceptance path
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: accepted static-analysis report and fuzzing/no-crash report with findings and dispositions
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: tool versions, commands, sanitizer set, corpus hashes, run budget, crashes, remediations, and accepted residual risks
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: reports show no unresolved unacceptable findings for the submitted source, binary, and parser surfaces

evidence_requirements.authority: EMVCo, recognized laboratory, scheme, or acquirer as applicable
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: signed conformance statement template or approval package tied to the claimed scope
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: template version, signer, signature date, submitted binary hash, ABI version, RTM version, and device/profile scope
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: signed template agrees with the ABI JSON statement, RTM, lab manifest, and approval artifact

evidence_requirements.authority: recognized laboratory, scheme, acquirer, or accepted test-tool owner
evidence_requirements.required_attachment: full masked APDU traces for every applicable lab/test-tool case
evidence_requirements.required_metadata: case IDs, ordering, SW1/SW2, expected and actual outcomes, trace identity, profile SHA-256, ABI version, and masking policy
evidence_requirements.acceptance_gate: trace pack is replayable, masked, complete for the claimed test plan, and tied to the submitted binary/profile set
